chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 657 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A” 2. For orders on CMA No.2715/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 12.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional AG >>>>>><<<<<<< Mr. Ather Hussain Abro, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, learned counsel for the Petitioner and submits that he has been instructed by the latter not to press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
